messages: Krampus swings his birch rod at {target}! They have been punished!
{user} calls upon Krampus to smack {target} with the birch rod!
The birch switches crack! {target} has been disciplined by Krampus!
*THWACK!* {target} feels the sting of Krampus's birch rod, courtesy of {user}!
Krampus drags {target} away for a good thrashing! Requested by {user}.
